Discount Price

DOAH 60HC $393.00 23.92% $299.00
Optional Hosting. Monthly Fee Corporate. Monthly fee.

DOAH 100HC $788.00 23.98% $599.00

DOAH UNLHC $1,183.00 24.01% $899.00

Cloud Administration Services for DOCFINITY CLOUD
* Cloud Administration Services fees are already included in the price of applicable products and services. They apply to DocFinity Concurrent Users, DocFinity Cloud
Storage, DocFinity Self-Service Gateway, Adept for DocFinity Cloud, DocFinity API and DocFinity VPN. These services include but are not limited to administration of the
system, servers, updates, and troubleshooting that are normally performed by the customers’ staff for on-premise deployment.
* DocFinity Cloud Administration Services are delivered remotely.
DocFinity Maintenance and Support Services for DOCFINITY CLOUD
* CDS does not charge any support or maintenance fee for CDS-developed modules that the customers use in the cloud. Updates, upgrades, maintenance and support
services are included in the cloud subscription fees for these modules.
* DocFinity support and maintenance service fees (Annual Maintenance Fees) for DocFinity Cloud implementation only apply to certain software components licensed
through One-Time License Fee (OTLF); Namely DocFinity Advanced Capture. The standard rate for maintenance services (For those components only) is 20% of the quoted
One-Time License Fee (OTLF) per year.
* DocFinity Maintenance and Support Services are delivered remotely
